title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Amazon Pharmacy to expand same-day delivery to nearly 4,500 US cities
items.description: The expansion will cover customers in newly served states such as Idaho and Massachusetts.

items.title: Microsoft says hackers are exploiting critical zero-day bugs to target Windows and Office users
items.description: Critical security flaws targeting Windows and Office users allow hackers to take complete control of a victim's computer by clicking a malicious link ...

items.title: Cash App adds payment links so you can get paid in a DM
items.description: The new feature allows users to share payment requests in a variety of digital settings.

items.title: Elon Musk suggests spate of xAI exits have been push, not pull
items.description: At least nine engineers, including two co-founders, have announced their exits from xAI in the past week, fueling online speculation and raising quest...

items.title: TikTok launches an opt-in Local Feed in the U.S. leveraging users’ precise location
items.description: TikTok's new Local Feed will show you nearby shopping, dining, events, news, and more.

items.title: Who will own your company’s AI layer? Glean’s CEO explains
items.description: Enterprise AI is shifting fast from chatbots that answer questions to systems that actually do the work across an organization. But who will own the A...

items.title: Upside Robotics is reducing fertilizer use and waste in corn crops
items.description: Upside Robotics builds autonomous solar-powered robots that can help farmers reduce their fertilizer use by 70%.

items.title: Build a pipeline and close deals with an exhibit table at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
items.description: Get an unmatched ROI by exhibiting your startup in front of 10,000 tech leaders and investors at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, October 13-15 in San Francis...

items.title: How to get into a16z’s super-competitive Speedrun startup accelerator program
items.description: TechCrunch spoke to a16z partner Joshua Lu for some tips on standing out for the Speedrun program.

items.title: Former Founders Fund VC Sam Blond launches AI sales startup to upend Salesforce
items.description: The startup, Monaco, has come out of stealth as an AI-native all-in-one CRM plus more system backed by names like the Collison brothers and Garry Tan.
